is_cflt_compliant.description: True if the user input already follows the [Core] -> [Reason] -> [Space] -> [Time] sequence.

cflt_l1.description: The reconstructed input in native language using the CFLT Core-First sequence.

cflt_l2.description: The target language translation using the CFLT Core-First sequence (token-for-token mapping).

standard_l2.description: The polished, idiomatic translation in the target language.

standard_l1.description: The polished, idiomatic reference in the native language to confirm intent.
